name: hoxaa_chr19
description: hoxaa cluster on chr19; descended from the teleost-specific genome duplication (TGD/3R WGD) ancestor of hoxa; retains ~10 hoxA paralogs (hoxa1a-hoxa13a) plus mira (mir-196a-1). Eight zebrafish hox clusters (hoxaa/ab, hoxba/bb, hoxca/cb, hoxda/db) arose from the teleost-specific whole-genome duplication (TGD/3R) ~320-350 Mya. Each cluster spans ~100-150 kb and contains 5-13 hox paralogs of the original ~13-member tetrapod cluster. Ohnolog identity within a cluster pair is 60-85% in coding regions but conserved ~75-95% in microRNAs (mir-10, mir-196).
expected_copy_count: 1 cluster per haplotype, paired with a sister TGD-ohnolog cluster on a different chromosome
